name: agent-passport-system
description: Governance infrastructure for AI agents. Ed25519 identity, scoped delegation, enforcement gateway under 2ms, 5-gate commerce, Merkle attribution, bilateral receipts (in-toto Decision Receipt v0.1), Instruction Provenance Receipt for instruction-context drift detection, Wave 1 accountability primitives (action, authority-boundary, custody, contestability, bundle), evidentiary type safety (claim/evidence registry, claim verifier, contestation cascade). 2,586 tests, 150 MCP tools. SDK 2.6.0-alpha.0 on npm under alpha tag.
author: aeoess
